drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I practise speaking English every day.
sentences.hindi: मैं हर दिन अंग्रेज़ी बोलने का अभ्यास करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i practise speaking english every day

sentences.english: He speaks better than before.
sentences.hindi: वह पहले से बेहतर बोलता है।
sentences.pronunciation: he speaks better than before

sentences.english: If I work hard, I will succeed.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैं मेहनत करूँ, तो सफल हो जाऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if i work hard i will succeed

drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: He said that he would come soon.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह जल्द आएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that he would come soon

sentences.english: Will you meet me today?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम आज मुझसे मिलोगे?
sentences.pronunciation: will you meet me today

sentences.english: I have to read this book.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह किताब पढ़नी है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have to read this book

drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: He has been working here for three years.
sentences.hindi: वह तीन साल से यहाँ काम कर रहा है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has been working here for three years

sentences.english: You are a very good person, aren't you?
sentences.hindi: तुम बहुत अच्छे इंसान हो, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you are a very good person aren't you

sentences.english: I have confidence in speaking English.
sentences.hindi: मुझे अंग्रेज़ी बोलने में आत्मविश्वास है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have confidence in speaking english

drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: I have learned from my mistakes.
sentences.hindi: मैंने अपनी गलतियों से सीखा है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have learned from my mistakes

sentences.english: This word is necessary for daily use.
sentences.hindi: यह शब्द रोज़ के इस्तेमाल के लिए जरूरी है।
sentences.pronunciation: this word is necessary for daily use

sentences.english: He knows good grammar.
sentences.hindi: वह अच्छा व्याकरण जानता है।
sentences.pronunciation: he knows good grammar

drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I express my thoughts clearly.
sentences.hindi: मैं अपने विचार स्पष्ट रूप से व्यक्त करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i express my thoughts clearly

sentences.english: This sentence is with correct grammar.
sentences.hindi: यह वाक्य सही व्याकरण के साथ है।
sentences.pronunciation: this sentence is with correct grammar

sentences.english: I like learning new vocabulary.
sentences.hindi: मुझे नई शब्दावली सीखना पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: i like learning new vocabulary

drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: Today I learned five new words.
sentences.hindi: आज मैंने पाँच नए शब्द सीखे।
sentences.pronunciation: today i learned five new words

sentences.english: He speaks with confidence.
sentences.hindi: वह आत्मविश्वास से बोलता है।
sentences.pronunciation: he speaks with confidence

sentences.english: I try to correct every mistake.
sentences.hindi: मैं हर गलती को सुधारने की कोशिश करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i try to correct every mistake

drills.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: This entire course is very useful.
sentences.hindi: यह पूरा पाठ्यक्रम बहुत उपयोगी है।
sentences.pronunciation: this entire course is very useful

sentences.english: I have learned a lot in the last seventy-five days.
sentences.hindi: मैंने पिछले पचहत्तर दिनों में बहुत कुछ सीखा।
sentences.pronunciation: i have learned a lot in the last seventy-five days
